# holistics_group (Resource)

A Holistics group. User membership is managed via `user_ids`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Group name.

### Optional

- `user_ids` (Set of Number) User IDs that are members of this group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Group ID.
